data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The design layout prioritizes easily clickable buttons and interfaces to minimize user effort.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Balances choice and simplicity by limiting the number of user options to improve decision-making.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits the information presented at any one time to avoid cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Chunking of information, minimalistic page design

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Organizes related items together to create a gestalt effect in listing and product displays.
data.technical_spec: CSS flexbox and grid, visual grouping

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encourages task completion by highlighting unfinished actions or incomplete user inputs.
